dataset.label: mushroom_all_sensors
dataset.description: Full multi-sensor session on blue oyster mushroom. All normalized values use Arduino normalize() 0-100 scale. See schema_notes for unit conversion. Proximity spikes at ~391k-393k ms = touch/interaction event cluster.

schema_notes.co2_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ppm = (val/100)*1600+400. SCD40 updates every 5s.
schema_notes.humidity_scd: Raw %RH from SCD40. SCD40 runs warm so humidity may read slightly low.
schema_notes.temp_sht_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw °C = (val/100)*40. SHT41 is more accurate than SCD40 temp.
schema_notes.proximity_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw = (val/100)*255. 255=object touching sensor, 0=nothing detected. APDS9960.
schema_notes.light_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ADC counts 0-65535. APDS9960 clear channel.
schema_notes.soil_norm: Normalized 0-100. Raw ~200(dry) to ~2000(saturated). Adafruit Seesaw capacitive.

dataset_ec_only.label: mushroom_ec_only
dataset_ec_only.description: Mushroom bioelectrical conductivity session. Raw ADC readings from analog pin A0. ref_neg (-50) and ref_pos (350) are hardcoded anchor values to lock Serial Plotter Y-axis. bioelectric_avg is a 200-sample rolling average (10x heavier smoothing than plant sketch). Sampling rate: ~6.7 Hz (delay 150ms). 8052 records spanning ~20 minutes. Peak bioelectric_raw = 359. Note: a separate version of this sketch outputs average-only (no timestamp, no anchors) for TouchDesigner real-time visualization.
